nodes.name: Auth Service
nodes.summary: Xu ly login, refresh token va session sync cho toan bo ung dung.

contextWindow.label: Primary scope
contextWindow.detail: Refresh token bi invalid sau 15 phut du cookie con han.

contextWindow.label: Recent change
contextWindow.detail: Da doi logic rotate token de chong replay attack.

contextWindow.label: Debug anchor
contextWindow.detail: Kiem tra saveSession() va thu tu update giua local cache voi cookie.

debugSignals.title: 401 sau refresh
debugSignals.symptom: Token moi duoc ghi vao storage nhung request ke tiep van gui token cu.

debugSignals.title: Race condition
debugSignals.symptom: Hai promise refresh chay song song khi app resume tu background.

chatHistory.message: Loi chi xuat hien sau khi tab sleep roi quay lai.
Nen trace lai vong doi refresh token va xem request nao ghi de session cuoi cung.

notes: Uu tien them request lock de ngan refresh song song.

nodes.name: Login Modal
nodes.summary: Node UI de nhap thong tin dang nhap, hien thi trang thai loi va loading.

contextWindow.label: Primary scope
contextWindow.detail: Spinner loading khong tat khi auth request fail vi timeout.

contextWindow.label: Visual symptom
contextWindow.detail: Form bi khoa khien user tuong he thong dung.

debugSignals.title: UI stuck
debugSignals.symptom: finally() khong chay vi mutation bi abort o nhanh phu.

chatHistory.message: Minh nghi modal khong reset state sau loi mang.

notes: Can dam bao state submitting duoc reset o moi nhanh.

nodes.name: API Gateway
nodes.summary: Diem vao cua request client, co retry, logging va error mapping.

contextWindow.label: Primary scope
contextWindow.detail: Gateway retry request 401 lam vong refresh bi lap vo han.

contextWindow.label: Error route
contextWindow.detail: Mapped error code AUTH_RETRY_LOOP chua duoc surface ra UI.

contextWindow.label: Debug anchor
contextWindow.detail: Kiem tra retry-policy voi dieu kien shouldRetryAuthError.

debugSignals.title: Infinite retry
debugSignals.symptom: Request bi retry lien tuc du response da danh dau doNotRetry.

debugSignals.title: Missing correlation id
debugSignals.symptom: Trace log khong noi duoc tu UI sang backend do thieu context id.

chatHistory.message: Node nay nen la trung tam debug vi no noi request path, auth state va server logs.

notes: Tao field correlationId o moi edge de lan loi sau trace nhanh hon.

nodes.name: Session Cache
nodes.summary: Lop cache giu phien gan nhat va context window cua session dang hoat dong.

contextWindow.label: Primary scope
contextWindow.detail: Cache khong tu invalid khi logout tu tab khac.

nodes.name: Audit Log
nodes.summary: Luu lai thay doi quan trong de doi chieu cac buoc dan den loi.

contextWindow.label: Primary scope
contextWindow.detail: Audit trail con thieu actor context khi request bat dau tu background job.

debugSignals.title: Lost actor
debugSignals.symptom: Ban ghi khong cho biet request toi tu user hay system task.
